summary: Frontend & Full Stack Developer skilled in React, Next.js, and TypeScript with a strong eye for UI/UX design. EC Engineering graduate (CGPA 8.0) from LDCE Ahmedabad with hands-on experience building production-deployed web applications. Experienced with GSAP animations, responsive design, and modern JavaScript frameworks. Open to remote opportunities.

projects.name: DevEvents
projects.description: A full-stack event discovery platform for developers that aggregates hackathons, meetups, and conferences. Built with Next.js and TypeScript featuring server-side rendering, dynamic routing, and API integration.
bullets: Built with Next.js 14 for SSR and optimal performance
Integrated external APIs for real-time event data aggregation
Implemented responsive UI with Tailwind CSS and dynamic filtering
Deployed on Vercel with CI/CD pipeline

projects.name: Awwwards Website Clone
projects.description: A pixel-perfect, visually dynamic clone of the Awwwards.com homepage showcasing advanced frontend animation skills using GSAP.
bullets: Implemented smooth scroll-based animations and transitions using GSAP timeline
Built custom cursor interactions, animated navigation, and hover effects
Achieved pixel-perfect responsive layout matching original Awwwards design
Optimized animation performance using GSAP's will-change and transform techniques

projects.name: SaaS Product Landing Page (Xora)
projects.description: A modern, responsive SaaS product landing page with clean UI, animated sections, and mobile-first design built without external frameworks.
bullets: Designed and developed entirely from scratch without UI frameworks
Implemented smooth scroll navigation, hero section, pricing, and testimonials
Fully responsive across mobile, tablet, and desktop breakpoints
Custom CSS animations for enhanced user engagement

projects.name: Macbook Scroll Demo
projects.description: An interactive macOS-inspired UI demo with advanced scroll-triggered animations simulating the Apple product page experience.
bullets: Used GSAP ScrollTrigger for precise animation control
Demonstrated advanced CSS transforms and perspective effects

projects.name: Stock App Demo
projects.description: A TypeScript-based stock market dashboard with real-time data display and interactive charts.
bullets: Built with TypeScript for type-safe financial data handling
Implemented dynamic charts and real-time market data display
Used React hooks for efficient state management

achievements: Solved 58+ problems on LeetCode with 82.4% acceptance rate (beats 66% of users globally)
Implemented key DS&A concepts: Recursion, BST, Arrays, Sorting — Easy (34) and Medium (24) level problems
CSS Battle: Solved precision CSS design challenges under time pressure
Chess64: Competed in strategic chess matches at college level
